data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] analyze-tool-use.py is under 1000 lines
  Verify: python3 -c "lines=len(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/analyze-tool-use.py').readlines()); assert lines < 1000, f'{lines} lines'; print('OK')"
- [ ] ticket-graph.py is under 1000 lines
  Verify: python3 -c "lines=len(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py').readlines()); assert lines < 1000, f'{lines} lines'; print('OK')"
- [ ] bridge-inbound.py is under 1000 lines
  Verify: python3 -c "lines=len(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/bridge-inbound.py').readlines()); assert lines < 1000, f'{lines} lines'; print('OK')"
- [ ] bridge-outbound.py is under 1000 lines
  Verify: python3 -c "lines=len(open('$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/bridge-outbound.py').readlines()); assert lines < 1000, f'{lines} lines'; print('OK')"
- [ ] All new module files import without error (backward compat via re-export shims)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, "plugins/dso/scripts"); print("import paths OK")'
- [ ] ruff check passes on all new and modified Python files
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
